name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: TitleMax offers title pawns using your vehicle title as collateral for same-day cash. Most credit types accepted; you keep driving your car while repaying.
description_long:
TitleMax is a national title pawn and title loan company. The Candler Road SE location in Atlanta, Georgia has been operating since July 2004, serving the greater Atlanta area from its address between Memorial Drive and Glenwood Road. This store is one of many TitleMax locations across Georgia and other states, offering short-term collateral-based lending under the title pawn model, which is the legally recognized product classification in Georgia.

The core product is a title pawn, which uses the borrower's vehicle title as collateral in exchange for fast cash. The lender does perform a credit check, but the company states that most credit types are accepted because the vehicle title itself secures the pawn. Requirements are straightforward: a vehicle, a clear (lien-free) vehicle title, and a valid government-issued ID. Customers can begin the process online through TitleMax's website, submit photos of their vehicle via smartphone for a remote appraisal, and receive an instant eligibility estimate before visiting the store to sign documents and collect funds.

What distinguishes this location includes a fully online application and appraisal workflow that reduces the need for an in-person visit until document signing, the ability to retain and continue driving the vehicle throughout the pawn period, and a long-standing local presence since 2004. The Candler Road SE store carries a 5.00 out of 5 average rating based on over 465 Google reviews, with multiple customer testimonials citing staff professionalism and clear explanations of the process.

Honestly assessed, title pawns are among the most expensive forms of short-term credit available. The TitleMax website does not disclose APR, fees, or repayment terms at the store page level, which makes cost comparison impossible without applying. The product is explicitly unavailable to active-duty military members and their spouses or dependents. Failure to repay risks repossession of the vehicle used as collateral. This is a last-resort product appropriate only when no lower-cost credit options are available and the borrower is confident in their ability to repay.
address: 5420 Old National Hwy, College Park, GA 30349

company_info.headquarters: 5420 Old National Hwy, College Park, GA 30349

pros: Most credit types accepted despite a credit check being performed
Fully online application and smartphone-based vehicle appraisal — no in-store visit required until signing
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle throughout the pawn period
Instant eligibility estimate shown before visiting a store
Store open since July 2004 with established local presence in Atlanta
5.00/5 average rating from 465+ Google reviews at this location
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment terms disclosed on the store page — cost is opaque until you apply
Vehicle repossession risk if unable to repay — collateral is your car
Not available to active-duty military members, their spouses, or dependents
Store is not bilingual — explicitly listed as 'No' on the location page
Sunday closure and limited Saturday hours (10am–4pm) restrict access on weekends
best_for: Car owners with a clear, lien-free vehicle title who need fast cash
Borrowers with poor or damaged credit who have been turned down for traditional loans
Atlanta-area residents facing a short-term cash emergency who can repay quickly
People who need same-day funding and cannot wait for a bank or credit union approval
diagnosis: TitleMax title pawns are designed for car owners with a clear vehicle title who need fast cash and cannot qualify for conventional credit. The product is expensive short-term debt — APR is not disclosed upfront — and carries real risk of vehicle loss if the pawn is not repaid, making it a genuine last-resort option rather than a routine borrowing tool.
services: Online customer portal for loan management
